module.name: Search
module.param: `custom_index` sourcetype=cucm_cdr $globalCallID_callManagerId$ $globalCallID_callId_search_expression$ $globalCallId_ClusterID$ | dedup call_reference_id | table call_reference_id | eval search="WILDCARD" + call_reference_id | format "(" "(" "" ")" "OR" ")" | eval search=replace(search,"WILDCARD","*") | eval additionalCubeClause=" OR (sourcetype=cube_cdr " + search + ")"

module.name: HTML
module.param:
This view is normally reached by clicking a row from the Investigate Calls page.

However you can also use this view manually by simply entering a Call Id in the field above and hitting Enter.

If you use multiple callManagers and multiple clusters, note that it's possible for two calls to have the same call id, so it's best to also enter the Call Manager Id and Cluster ID.

module.name: ResultsValueSetter
Search
module.param: `custom_index` (sourcetype=cucm_cdr $globalCallID_callManagerId$ $globalCallID_callId_search_expression$ $globalCallId_ClusterID$) $additionalCubeClause$ | `convert_ip_address(origIpAddr)` | `convert_ip_address(destIpAddr)` | `convert_ip_address(origMediaTransportAddress_IP)` | `convert_ip_address(destMediaTransportAddress_IP)` | `convert_ip_address(origVideoTransportAddress_IP)` | `convert_ip_address(destVideoTransportAddress_IP)` | `get_sites` | `get_locations` | `get_custom_type_fields` | eval duration=tostring(duration,"duration") | fillnull value="" duration callingPartyNumber originalCalledPartyNumber calledPartyNumber cause_description orig_gateway dest_gateway lastRedirectDn origIpAddr origDeviceName destIpAddr destDeviceName huntPilotDn origSite destSite | fields - _* | transpose | rename column as field

module.name: Fields
module.param: duration seconds_until_answered type callingPartyNumber originalCalledPartyNumber calledPartyNumber cause_description orig_gateway dest_gateway lastRedirectDn origIpAddr origDeviceName destIpAddr destDeviceName huntPilotDn

module.name: Search
module.param:
`custom_index` (sourcetype=cucm_cdr $globalCallID_callManagerId$ $globalCallID_callId_search_expression$ $globalCallId_ClusterID$) $additionalCubeClause$ | `convert_ip_address(origIpAddr)` | `convert_ip_address(destIpAddr)` | `convert_ip_address(origMediaTransportAddress_IP)` | `convert_ip_address(destMediaTransportAddress_IP)` | `convert_ip_address(origVideoTransportAddress_IP)` | `convert_ip_address(destVideoTransportAddress_IP)` | `get_sites` | `get_locations` | `get_custom_type_fields` | eval duration=tostring(duration,"duration") | eval callerHungUp=if(origCallTerminationOnBehalfOf="12" OR origTerminationOnBehalfOf="12","
(caller hung up)","") | eval calledPartyHungUp=if(destCallTerminationOnBehalfOf="12" OR destTerminationOnBehalfOf="12","
(called party hung up)","") | eval type=if(sourcetype=="cube_cdr","(direction="+direction+")", type) | eval cause_description=if(sourcetype=="cube_cdr","(activity="+activity+")", cause_description) | fields - _raw | `sort_call_legs` | fields _time sourcetype $results.fields$ `id_fields` callerHungUp calledPartyHungUp

module.name: PostProcess
module.param:
| stats values(sourcetype) as sourcetype | search sourcetype="cube_cdr" | eval cubeBackgroundColorMessage="

Note: the rows in light blue are actually CUBE CDR, not UCM CDR

"

module.name: HTML
module.param:
Showing $results.count$ leg(s) for call id(s) $globalCallID_callId.rawValue$ on node $globalCallID_callManagerId.rawValue$ in cluster=$globalCallId_ClusterID.rawValue$

$cubeBackgroundColorMessage$

module.name: Table
module.param: globalCallID_callManagerId, globalCallID_callId, globalCallId_ClusterID, callerHungUp, calledPartyHungUp, sourcetype

module.name: Search
module.param: `custom_index` (sourcetype=cucm_cdr $globalCallID_callManagerId$ $globalCallID_callId$ $globalCallId_ClusterID$) $additionalCubeClause$ | `convert_ip_address(destIpAddr)` | `convert_ip_address(destMediaTransportAddress_IP)` | `convert_ip_address(destVideoTransportAddress_IP)` | `convert_ip_address(origIpAddr)` | `convert_ip_address(origMediaTransportAddress_IP)` | `convert_ip_address(origVideoTransportAddress_IP)` | `get_sites` | `get_locations` | `get_countries` | `get_to_and_from` | `get_quality` | `get_custom_type_fields` | table * | fields - _* | transpose 100 | rename column as field | foreach row* [eval value=if(length('<<FIELD>>')>0, mvappend(value,'<<FIELD>>'),value)] | eval value=mvjoin(mvdedup(value),", ") | where isnotnull(value) AND value!=""

module.name: HTML
module.param: Showing all $results.count$ populated fields for this call

module.module:
$search.timeRange.earliest$ $search.timeRange.latest$ `custom_index` `cucm_sourcetypes` $globalCallID_callId_search_expression$ $globalCallID_callManagerId$ $globalCallId_ClusterID$ | eval duration=tostring(duration,"duration") | `convert_ip_address(destIpAddr)` | `convert_ip_address(origIpAddr)` | `get_sites` | `get_locations` | stats sum(legs) as call_legs earliest(_time) as _time min(dateTimeOrigination) as dateTimeOrigination min(dateTimeConnect) as dateTimeConnect max(dateTimeDisconnect) as dateTimeDisconnect values(*) as * | sort - _time | `get_to_and_from` | eval from="(" . from . ")" | eval to="(" . to . ")" | fields - _* punct sourcetype source date_* | eval duration=mvjoin(duration,", ") | eval callingPartyNumber=mvjoin(callingPartyNumber,"::::") | eval originalCalledPartyNumber=mvjoin(originalCalledPartyNumber,"::::") | eval calledPartyNumber=mvjoin(finalCalledPartyNumber,"::::") | eval origDeviceName=mvjoin(origDeviceName,"::::") | eval destDeviceName=mvjoin(destDeviceName,"::::") | eval dateTimeOrigination=strftime(dateTimeOrigination, "%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S") | eval dateTimeConnect=if(dateTimeConnect==0,"(never)",strftime(dateTimeConnect, "%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S")) | eval dateTimeDisconnect=strftime(dateTimeDisconnect, "%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S") | rename call_legs as legs | eval showCallLegTimeline=if(legs>1,"yes","no") ' type, callingPartyNumber,originalCalledPartyNumber,calledPartyNumber, from, to, callingParty ,origDeviceName,destDeviceName,dateTimeOrigination,dateTimeConnect,dateTimeDisconnect,duration,origCause_description,destCause_description,lastRedirectRedirect_description,origCalledPartyRedirect_description, on_hook_party, legs, showCallLegTimeline createMultiValueClauses calling numbers: $callingPartyNumber.link$ $from$
original numbers called: $originalCalledPartyNumber.link$
final numbers called: $calledPartyNumber.link$ $to$
type: $type$
party that terminated the call: $on_hook_party$

originated: $dateTimeOrigination$
connected: $dateTimeConnect$
disconnected: $dateTimeDisconnect$
duration: $duration$ useLocaleForTimeStampRendering Originating device: $origDeviceName.link$
Destination device: $destDeviceName.link$

Call release cause (orig): $origCause_description$
Call release cause (dest): $destCause_description$

Last Redirect reason: $lastRedirectRedirect_description$
origCalledParty redirect reason: $origCalledPartyRedirect_description$ $showCallLegTimeline$ $search.timeRange.earliest$ $search.timeRange.latest$ `custom_index` (sourcetype=cucm_cdr $globalCallID_callManagerId$ $globalCallID_callId_search_expression$ $globalCallId_ClusterID$) $additionalCubeClause$ | fillnull callingPartyNumber calledPartyNumber value="(no number)" | eval _time=case(dateTimeConnect!="0", dateTimeConnect,dateTimeDisconnect!="0",dateTimeDisconnect,true(),dateTimeOrigination) | sort - _time | eventstats count as total_legs | streamstats count as leg | eval parties=tostring(total_legs-leg+1) + ":" + callingPartyNumber + "->" + calledPartyNumber + if(sourcetype=="cube_cdr","(CUBE)","") | table _time parties leg duration | eval duration=mvrange(0,duration+1) | mvexpand duration | eval _time=_time+duration | eventstats min(_time) as min_time max(_time) as max_time | where _time<=max_time AND _time>=min_time | timechart fixedrange=false span=1s max(leg) by parties limit=75 line hide hide hide right collapsed $legs$ False False False False

Timeline of all $legs$ call legs


`custom_index` sourcetype=cucm_cmr $globalCallID_callId_search_expression$ $globalCallID_callManagerId$ $globalCallId_ClusterID$ | `fields_for_cmr` $search.timeRange.earliest$ $search.timeRange.latest$

Call quality information (CMR)

Other calls to/from the calling party (or calling parties)

callingPartyNumberLogic callingPartyNumberIsSet callingPartyNumberIsNotSet $callingPartyNumberLogic$ `custom_index` sourcetype=cucm_cdr $callingPartyNumber.searchTerm$ | `fields_for_call_detail` | eval detailLatest=_time + duration | eval duration=tostring(duration,"duration") | head 50000 | stats earliest(_time) as _time max(detailLatest) as detailLatest values(*) as * by call_id | `get_time_window_for_detail_views` | `fields_for_call_detail` | sort - _time | `rename_fields` | fields call_id callManagerId clusterId count | streamstats count current=f | `unrename_fields` | search $globalCallID_callId_search_expression$ $globalCallID_callManagerId$ $globalCallId_ClusterID$ | eval count=floor(count/10)*10 | rename count as "results.offset" results.offset eval rowClass=if((call_id=="$globalCallID_callId.rawValue$" AND callManagerId=="$globalCallID_callManagerId.rawValue$" AND clusterId=="$globalCallId_ClusterID.rawValue$"),"selected","") | eval cpn_class=if(callingParty in $callingPartyNumber.values$,"selectedHighlight",null()) | eval ocpn_class=if(origCalledParty in $callingPartyNumber.values$,"selectedHighlight",null()) | eval fcpn_class=if(calledParty in $callingPartyNumber.values$,"selectedHighlight",null()) callManagerId call_id clusterId rowClass detailEarliest detailLatest cpn_class ocpn_class fcpn_class $row.fields.rowClass$ $row.fields.cpn_class$ $row.fields.ocpn_class$ $row.fields.fcpn_class$ call_detail $row.fields.call_id$ $row.fields.callManagerId$ $row.fields.clusterId$ $selectedFields$ $row.fields.detailEarliest$ $row.fields.detailLatest$ True $bc_earliest$ $bc_latest$ $bc_type$ $bc_number$ $bc_numberType$ $bc_searchterms$ $bc_advancedSearchLanguage$ (This record specified no callingPartyNumber)

Other calls to/from the called party (or called parties)

`custom_index` sourcetype=cucm_cdr $calledPartyNumber.searchTerm$ | `fields_for_call_detail` | eval detailLatest=_time + duration | eval duration=tostring(duration,"duration") | head 50000 | stats earliest(_time) as _time max(detailLatest) as detailLatest values(*) as * by call_id | `get_time_window_for_detail_views` | `fields_for_call_detail` | sort - _time | `rename_fields` | fields call_id clusterId callManagerId count | streamstats count current=f | `unrename_fields` | search $globalCallID_callId_search_expression$ $globalCallID_callManagerId$ $globalCallId_ClusterID$ | eval count=floor(count/10)*10 | rename count as "results.offset" results.offset eval rowClass=if((call_id=="$globalCallID_callId.rawValue$" AND callManagerId=="$globalCallID_callManagerId.rawValue$" AND clusterId=="$globalCallId_ClusterID.rawValue$"),"selected","") | eval cpn_class=if(callingParty in $calledPartyNumber.values$,"selectedHighlight",null()) | eval ocpn_class=if(origCalledParty in $calledPartyNumber.values$,"selectedHighlight",null()) | eval fcpn_class=if(calledParty in $calledPartyNumber.values$,"selectedHighlight",null()) callManagerId call_id clusterId rowClass detailEarliest detailLatest cpn_class ocpn_class fcpn_class $row.fields.rowClass$ $row.fields.cpn_class$ $row.fields.ocpn_class$ $row.fields.fcpn_class$ call_detail $row.fields.call_id$ $row.fields.callManagerId$ $row.fields.clusterId$ $selectedFields$ $row.fields.detailEarliest$ $row.fields.detailLatest$ True $bc_earliest$ $bc_latest$ $bc_type$ $bc_number$ $bc_numberType$ $bc_searchterms$ $bc_advancedSearchLanguage$

module.name: Search
module.param: `custom_index` sourcetype=cucm_cdr $globalCallID_callManagerId$ $globalCallID_callId_search_expression$ $globalCallId_ClusterID$ ciscoguid=* NOT ciscoguid="" | stats count by ciscoguid | search NOT ciscoguid=""

module.name: HTML
module.param: Looking for other data sources involved in this call

module.name: PostProcess
module.param: | fields - count | eval search=ciscoguid | format "(" "" "OR" "" "OR" ")" | rename search as match_raw_or_extracted

module.name: Search
module.param: `customizable_other_notable_indexes` NOT (`cucm_sourcetypes`) NOT (`cube_sourcetypes`) $match_raw_or_extracted$ | stats count by sourcetype index

module.name: HTML
module.param:
(no results found)

(We searched for this call's "ciscoguid" values in other sourcetypes and indexes but we didn't find any)

module.name: HTML
module.param: Click one of the rows below to explore where one or more of this call's "ciscoguid" values appears in the given sourcetype and index.
